title: Design System: MAE - Manga Anime Edits

display.purpose: Page titles only. One per screen.

title.purpose: Card headings, game titles, event names.

body.purpose: Descriptions, bio text, event details. Max 75ch line length.

label.purpose: Badges, metadata, timestamps, small hints. Always semibold.

mono.purpose: User IDs, scores, numerical data. Geist Mono.

motion.name: hover-transition
motion.purpose: Standard hover state transition for all interactive elements.

motion.name: focus-ring
motion.purpose: Focus indicator for buttons, inputs, and links.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main action button. Violet Pulse background, Ash Text. Used for primary actions like 'Mainkan', 'Login', 'Buat Game'.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #8b5cf6; color: #ededed; padding: 12px 24px; border-radius: 8px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.875rem; font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; border: none; transition: background 0.2s ease-out, box-shadow 0.2s ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #7c3aed; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px oklch(62% 0.25 290 / 0.2); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Supporting action button. Ink Panel background with border. Used for 'Kembali', 'Keluar', 'Kelola Soal'.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: #1e1e2e; color: #ededed; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 8px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.875rem; font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; border: 1px solid #2a2a3a; transition: background 0.2s ease-out; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #2a2a3e; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px oklch(62% 0.25 290 / 0.2); }

components.name: Danger Button
components.description: Destructive action button. Ember Red background. Used for 'Hapus', 'Hapus Akun'.
components.css: .ds-btn-danger { background: #ef4444; color: #ededed; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 8px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.875rem; font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; border: none; transition: background 0.2s ease-out; } .ds-btn-danger:hover { background: #dc2626; } .ds-btn-danger:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px oklch(62% 0.25 290 / 0.2); }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Text input with dark background and focus ring. Used for all form fields.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; padding: 12px 16px; background: #1a1a2e; border: 1px solid #2a2a3a; border-radius: 8px; color: #ededed; font-size: 1rem; font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; transition: border-color 0.2s ease-out, box-shadow 0.2s ease-out; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #8b5cf6; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px oklch(62% 0.25 290 / 0.2); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #a1a1aa; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Primary content container. Ink Surface background with subtle border. Used for game cards, profile cards, leaderboard rows.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #16161d; border: 1px solid #2a2a3a; border-radius: 12px; padding: 24px; color: #ededed; font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; transition: border-color 0.2s ease-out; } .ds-card:hover { border-color: #8b5cf6; }

components.name: Badge
components.description: Pill-shaped label for roles and categories. Translucent background with saturated text.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-block; padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 9999px; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-badge-admin { background: oklch(70% 0.18 350 / 0.2); color: #f472b6; } .ds-badge-member { background: oklch(62% 0.25 290 / 0.2); color: #8b5cf6; } .ds-badge-gold { background: oklch(78% 0.16 85 / 0.2); color: #eab308; }

components.name: Navigation Bar
components.description: Sticky top navigation with brand wordmark, role-aware links, and user info. Gradient text on brand name is the only allowed gradient text in the system.
components.html:
MAE - Manga Anime Edits
BerandaGamesLeaderboard
components.css: .ds-navbar { position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 50; background: #0f0f17; border-bottom: 1px solid #2a2a3a; height: 64px; display: flex; align-items: center; padding: 0 16px; font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-navbar-brand { font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 700; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #8b5cf6, #f472b6); -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; background-clip: text; } .ds-navbar-links { display: flex; gap: 4px; margin-left: 24px; } .ds-navbar-link { padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #a1a1aa; text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.2s ease-out, color 0.2s ease-out; } .ds-navbar-link:hover { color: #ededed; background: #1e1e2e; } .ds-navbar-link-active { background: #8b5cf6; color: #ededed; }

components.name: Profile Avatar
components.description: Circular identity marker with fallback initial. Sizes: 40px (list), 48px (leaderboard), 56px (profile card), 96px (profile page).
components.css: .ds-avatar { border-radius: 9999px; background: #8b5cf6; color: #ededed; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-weight: 700; font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; overflow: hidden; } .ds-avatar-sm { width: 40px; height: 40px; font-size: 0.875rem; } .ds-avatar-md { width: 48px; height: 48px; font-size: 1rem; } .ds-avatar-lg { width: 56px; height: 56px; font-size: 1.25rem; } .ds-avatar-xl { width: 96px; height: 96px; font-size: 2rem; } .ds-avatar img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; }

narrative.overview:
MAE is a competitive arena for manga/anime fans. The interface is a dark stage where player identities, scores, and rankings command attention. Every screen is built around one question: who's winning, and can you beat them?

This system rejects generic SaaS dashboards with their blue-white corporatism, overly childish gamification with cartoon badges, dark-mode-for-the-sake-of-dark-mode crypto/neon aesthetics, and cluttered gaming portals with flashing banners. The dark theme is not a style choice; it's the stage.

The density is medium: enough information to feel competitive, not enough to overwhelm. Scores, badges, and player names are the visual hierarchy's first-class citizens. Navigation is secondary to play.
keyCharacteristics: Dark canvas with purple and pink as the only accent colors, creating a focused spotlight effect
Tactile, punchy interactions: buttons respond with clear hover shifts, cards acknowledge your presence with border highlights
Scores and rankings are always visible; competition is the ambient atmosphere
Indonesian-first copy, casual and energetic, never corporate
Mobile-first: every touch target is generous, every layout stacks cleanly

rules.name: The Spotlight Rule
rules.body: Only two colors carry action: Violet Pulse for interaction, Sakura Glow for identity. If an element isn't a button, input, or link, it doesn't get Violet Pulse. If it isn't about community or role, it doesn't get Sakura Glow.

rules.name: The Gold Rarity Rule
rules.body: Gold Achievement appears only on earned achievements and top-3 leaderboard positions. If you see gold on a button or a decorative element, the design is wrong.

rules.name: The One Display Rule
rules.body: One display heading per screen. If you have two 2.25rem headings on the same page, one of them is wrong. Use headline for the second.

rules.name: The Mono Data Rule
rules.body: Scores, IDs, and numerical rankings use Geist Mono. Names, descriptions, and labels do not.

rules.name: The Flat Stage Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat. Depth is conveyed through color, not shadow. If you're adding a box-shadow, you're adding visual noise, not hierarchy.

rules.name: The Focus Ring Rule
rules.body: Every interactive element must have a visible focus indicator. The Violet Pulse ring at 20% opacity is the standard.

dos: Use Violet Pulse exclusively for interactive elements (buttons, links, active states, focus rings)
Keep the dark palette consistent. Every surface should be one of: Ink Black, Ink Surface, Ink Panel, Ink Input, Ink Navbar
Use Geist Mono for scores, IDs, and numerical data
Keep badges pill-shaped with translucent backgrounds
Make every touch target at least 44px tall on mobile
Use Indonesian for all UI copy
Show one display heading per screen
donts: Use gradient text anywhere except the 'MAE - Manga Anime Edits' brand wordmark
Use generic SaaS dashboard aesthetics (blue/white, corporate card grids, boring tables)
Add cartoon badges, excessive animations, or childish gamification elements
Use dark mode with purple gradients and neon accents as a default aesthetic
Create cluttered gaming portals with flashing banners
Add box-shadows to cards or containers
Use display fonts in buttons, labels, or data
Animate layout properties (width, height, margin, padding)
Use modals as a first solution
